headline: Humana Jumps 6%, UnitedHealth Climbs 5%, Cigna Rises 4% as Analysts Cheer Softer Medical Cost Trends
summary: Health insurers are running higher in Thursday afternoon trading after a wave of bullish Wall Street analyst notes on the managed-care sector, centered on UnitedHealth, citing softer medical cost and utilization trends plus potential AI efficiency upside. Humana (NYSE:HUM) stock is leading the move, up 6% to $348, with UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) stock up 5% ... Humana Jumps 6%, UnitedHealth Climbs 5%, Cigna Rises 4% as Analysts Cheer Softer Medical Cost Trends

headline: UNH, CVS Lead S&P 500 Health Insurers Flashing Buy Signals
summary: UnitedHealth Group, CVS Health and other S&P 500 health insurance giant rallied on Thursday morning after price target hikes from Morgan Stanley and a UNH upgrade from BofA. The analysts highlighted moderating health care utilization trends and a tailwind to profitability from deploying AI.
